Load Testing Report — Search Service: Load tests were conducted against the search service using k6 with a target of 500 concurrent virtual users over a 20-minute sustained test. The p99 response time was 420ms at peak load, exceeding the 350ms SLA target, indicating a need for further optimization. Database connection pool exhaustion was identified as the bottleneck; increasing the pool size from 25 to 50 connections improved p99 to 290ms in a follow-up test. The team recommends adding read replicas before the Q2 traffic surge anticipated from the marketing campaign.
